programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted ponders how being in the right place at the right time can impact a person's life; Barney celebrates his 200th female conquest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Stella's fiancé, Tony, tries to help Ted find a job; Barney tries to talk his way out of a speeding ticket.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted wonders if he should explore other career options; Marshall tries to lure Ted to the roof for a surprise birthday party.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: All My Life
programme.desc: Jennifer Carter and Solomon Chau are a sweet, fun-loving, newly engaged couple who are ready to start their lives together. But when Solomon is diagnosed with terminal liver cancer, their hopes for a summer wedding become impossible. With time running out, their friends and families soon devise an inspirational plan to help Jennifer and Solomon realize their dream wedding.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Why Can't My Life Be a Rom-Com?
programme.desc: Eliza is smart and independent, but after years of bad boyfriends, Eliza finds herself newly single, jobless, and questioning all her decisions. Throwing caution to the wind, Eliza follows her best friend, Sofia, to the Hamptons and decides to change her approach to romance. They're going to follow the rules of dating from a 50-year-old self-help book.

programme.title: Royal Rendezvous
programme.desc: An East L.A. chef is invited to Ireland to cook a royal banquet for a Lord's grandmother in hopes of stopping her from selling their manor. But budding romances threaten to derail the plan.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Todd tries to help out and coach Grayson's baseball team but discovers he's in over his head; he struggles to gain control of overzealous nine-year-olds.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: When Savannah wants to go to college a year early, Todd wages a family competition to keep her home as long as possible; Chase pays the price when Todd is his ACT coach.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Todd recruits Savannah to help teach Chase a lesson after learning he is dating several different girls on Valentine's Day; Chase is left the victim of a Catfish prank only Toddy Chrisley could dream up.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Todd puts Savannah on a realistic budget to help prepare her for the real world; when she is fired from two jobs, she must dig deep to make her money back.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: A road trip to Nashville, Tenn., to tour a college campus; Todd is excited for family bonding time, but Savannah has plans of her own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Todd's feelings are hurt when no one needs his help, until Savannah gets appendicitis; Savannah decides to milk it and becomes the patient from hell.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Todd and Julie realize they have sheltered their children after Chase pays a stranger to change his flat tire, so they put them through a real-life boot camp to prepare teach them the basics of life.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Savannah is keeping her new boyfriend from the family, he goes to extreme lengths to get a glimpse of the new guy.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: With his birthday approaching, Todd begins to obsess about his age; but Mama Faye and her friends try to help him be more accepting; the children plan a surprise party.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Julie is eager to start a food blog, but when no one likes her page, she and Todd go on a food journey.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Grayson persuades his family to stay overnight at a working dude ranch for his birthday, thereby testing the family's ability to be country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah are excited to travel to London, however Todd does not share the sentiment; the family tries to break free of Todd's control.

programme.desc: Lily forces Barney and Robin to face their fears about defining their relationship; Ted is anxious about his first lecture at Columbia.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted realizes that his blind date is actually someone he dated years earlier -- and they still have nothing in common.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin investigates when she thinks Barney is cheating on her, only to find that he is spending his time with Ted, taking lessons in how to date her.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily and Marshall come on too strong to impress Robin and Barney, who then try to break off the double-dating.

programme.desc: Barney wants Robin to become an American citizen; Lily joins Marshall and Ted on their road trip.

programme.desc: When Robin and Barney hit a rough patch in their relationship, Lily tries to break them up.

programme.desc: After breaking up with Robin, Barney pulls out all of his greatest tricks to get back into the dating scene.

programme.desc: The gang struggles to quit smoking; Robin clashes with a new, jaded co-worker.

programme.desc: Marshall tries to prove that his attractive female colleague (Amanda Peet) kissed him; Robin discovers that a drinking game has been made up about her.

programme.desc: To forget about their own miserable week, Barney's friends root him on in his quest to have the perfect week.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall and Lily try to decide if they are ready to have a baby; Robin gets offered her dream job.

programme.title: Polite Society
programme.desc: Martial artist-in-training Ria Khan believes she must save her older sister Lena from her impending marriage. After enlisting the help of her friends, Ria attempts to pull off the most ambitious of all wedding heists in the name of independence and sisterhood.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Arranged Love
programme.desc: After fleeing an arranged marriage, leaving India and an inheritance behind, Meera reinvented herself in the tech world in America. However, when a costly problem threatens her business, her inheritance is exactly what she needs to solve it. Unfortunately, she can only access the money if she's married... so Meera returns to India with a plan to inform her family she is married to the handsome Rama, whom she met only days ago.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest sits down with Kris, Kim, Khloé, Kourtney, Kendall and Kylie to reflect back on the most monumental events in their lives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Damon Wayans Jr & Vincent Oshana, Michael Ealy & Khatira Rafiqzada and Fortune & her wife Jax compete remotely from their own homes in a night of fun and games hosted by Kevin Hart.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face
programme.sub-title: Cedric the Entertainer Busts Kevin's Balls

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friday
programme.desc: It's Friday and Craig Jones has just gotten fired for stealing cardboard boxes. To make matters worse, rent is due, he hates his overbearing girlfriend, Joi, and his best friend, Smokey, owes the local drug dealer money -- and that's all before lunch. As the hours drag on, Jones and Smokey experience the gamut of urban life, complete with crackheads, shoot-outs and overly sexual pastors, concentrated into one single, unbelievable Friday.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Next Friday
programme.desc: Craig bails his friend out of trouble, survives a climactic confrontation with Debo, the neighborhood bully, and ends up with the girl. In Next Friday the bully is back as Debo, who spent two years behind bars, is released from prison. Fearing for his son's safety, Craig's father sends his son to live with Uncle Elroy. However, Craig soon learns that trouble can find you no matter where you live.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friday After Next
programme.desc: Finds Craig (Ice Cube) and Day-Day (Mike Epps) back in the old neighborhood where it all began. It's Christmastime and a ghetto Santa Claus breaks into their run-down apartment, stealing all their presents, along with anything else he can stuff into his sack, including the rent money hidden in their stereo speakers. Their only hope to not get evicted before Christmas is to take jobs as security guards at a local mall, where they learn some comic lessons about the true meaning of the holidays.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: It's Friday and Craig Jones has just gotten fired for stealing cardboard boxes.
